---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address. Why do you need it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work. Include details about the expected behavior, UI changes, or API additions.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
